title: [cross-impl] OSCORE SSN width mismatch across impls
description: Python (40-bit: (1<<40)-1) and Rust (OscoreSeqNum MAX=(1<<40)-1, 5-byte PIV) vs Zephyr C (uint32_t sender_seq + OSCORE_SSN_MAX=UINT32_MAX). Leads to different exhaustion points (~4B vs ~1T msgs), PIV encoding, replay logic, and interop failures for long-lived sessions. Commits reviewed: ad37f4d3f (oscore.h, seqnum.rs, tests), dd794057c/87f90bc7b (oscore.c), others touching python sim/crypto. Same RFC 8613 algorithm implemented with divergent behavior.
